summary: Comprehensive testing of BNI Prezenta App (Romanian attendance management). Fixed ESLint compilation error in useRealtimeSync.js. All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend pages tested and working: Login, Dashboard, Members, Speakers, Treasury, Settings. SSE endpoint verified. Round-Robin speaker scheduling working.
passed_tests: Backend - Login with admin/admin123 credentials (200 OK)
Backend - Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend - GET /api/speakers/next returns Round-Robin schedule with eligible_count
Backend - SSE endpoint rejects invalid token (401)
Backend - SSE endpoint accepts valid token (text/event-stream)
Frontend - Login page loads with Romanian text
Frontend - Login with admin/admin123 redirects to dashboard
Frontend - Dashboard displays Members and Invitați tables
Frontend - Dashboard shows PREZ checkbox, TAXA input, TOTAL LUNĂ columns
Frontend - Green highlighting (bg-green-100) for present members
Frontend - Members page shows Status (Activ/Inactiv) column
Frontend - Members page shows Data MSP column with color coding
Frontend - Members page shows Dorește Prezentare checkbox column
Frontend - Members page shows statistics (Total, Activi, MSP Activ)
Frontend - Speakers page shows 'Următorii Vorbitori' (Round-Robin 12 slots)
Frontend - Speakers page shows 'Istoric Vorbitori' table
Frontend - Treasury page shows total and entries with color-coded amounts
Frontend - Settings page has Export/Import buttons
Frontend - Settings page has Email settings section
Frontend - Settings page has Password change section
Frontend - Navigation sidebar works for all pages
seed_data_creation: Existing test data: 6 members (Adam Maksay, Andrei Georgescu, Elena Vasilescu, Ion Popescu, Maria Ionescu, Test SSE), treasury entries totaling 2,000 RON
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Fixed ESLint error in useRealtimeSync.js (changed eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps to eslint-disable-next-line). Backend APIs fully tested with pytest. Frontend UI verified with Playwright. SSE endpoint working with valid JWT token. Round-Robin speaker scheduling shows 12 slots with eligible members. Email sending is MOCKED (requires SMTP configuration).

features_verified.dashboard_membri_table: Working - displays members with PREZ, TAXA, TOTAL LUNĂ columns
features_verified.dashboard_invitati_table: Working - displays guests with add form
features_verified.members_page: Working - shows Status (Activ/Inactiv), Data MSP, Dorește Prezentare columns
features_verified.members_statistics: Working - Total Membri, Membri Activi, Membri cu MSP Activ
features_verified.speakers_page: Working - Următorii Vorbitori (Round-Robin 12 slots) and Istoric Vorbitori
features_verified.speakers_round_robin: Working - shows eligible_count, slot numbers, next_date inputs
features_verified.treasury_page: Working - shows total, add entry form, entries with color-coded amounts
features_verified.settings_page: Working - Export/Import, Email settings, Password change

mocked_apis.email_sending: MOCKED - /api/send-pdf-email requires SMTP configuration (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD) which is not set in preview environment

fix_applied.issue: ESLint error: Definition for rule 'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps' was not found
fix_applied.fix: Changed '// eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps' to '// eslint-disable-next-line' on line 47
